trait.name: Keen Smell
entries: The bear has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The bear makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its claws.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. {@h}Hit: 10 ({@dice 1d10+5}) piercing damage plus 5 ({@dice 1d8}) cold damage.

action.name: Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}Hit: 14 ({@dice 2d8+5}) slashing damage plus 5 ({@dice 1d8}) cold damage.

action.name: Frost Breath
entries: The bear exhales a blast of freezing wind in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a {@dc 12} Constitution saving throw, taking 18 ({@dice 4d8}) cold damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
